voice_description: Formal, empathetic, professional. Always acknowledge the customer's frustration before offering a solution. Use complete sentences. Avoid slang or overly casual language.

examples.excellent: Thank you for reaching out, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you've experienced. I've processed a full refund to your original payment method — you should see it reflected within 3-5 business days. I've also applied a 15% credit to your account for your next order. If there's anything else I can assist with, please don't hesitate to let me know.
examples.acceptable: I'm sorry about this issue. I've refunded your order and it should appear in 3-5 days. Let me know if you need anything else.
examples.poor: Done! Refunded. Lmk if you need anything else 👍
